package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for test_bootstrap_package_reused_by_production_wiring: Production startup code that imports test-only bootstrap helpers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule199NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule199NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule199NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario199Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule199NegativeService, input Rule199NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
